faqs.answer: Our refund policy depends on the fare rules and supplier conditions attached to your booking. Refundable fares can usually be cancelled with the applicable airline or service fee, while non-refundable fares may only return unused taxes if permitted. For a confirmed refund amount, please share your booking reference and our team will verify the airline rules before processing.

Booking changes are subject to airline fare rules, seat availability, and any fare difference at the time of the change. If you want to reschedule a trip, send the booking reference and new travel dates and our team can check the reissue cost.

We can support payment methods such as major debit or credit cards and other methods your booking team enables on the website. If you want the exact options for your market, the final payment choices should be shown during checkout or can be confirmed by your support team.

Baggage allowance depends on the airline, route, cabin, and fare brand. The safest approach is to check the baggage details shown with the selected fare before ticketing, because low fares may not include checked baggage.

Support hours and channels can vary by office or brand. If your website has a published contact page, that should remain the source of truth. This chatbot can also hand off the customer message so your team can continue the booking conversation.

policies.terms_and_conditions: All bookings are subject to airline fare rules, supplier policies, and applicable taxes. Prices can change until ticketing is completed.
policies.refund_policy: Refund eligibility depends on fare conditions. Non-refundable fares may only return unused taxes, while refundable fares may include cancellation fees.
policies.exchange_charges: Exchange charges include airline change fees plus any fare difference at the time of reissue.
policies.refund_charges: Refund charges can include supplier cancellation penalties and service fees based on fare rules.
